reviews.comment:
Suelo pasar de noche cada vez que viajo al norte solo aceptaban efectivo no se puede usar la aplicacion para pagar y tuve problemas con el debito,no me supieron explicar porque aceptaban solo efectivo,3 veces masomenos.
No se hace respetar la orientacion para cargar combustible.

(Translated by Google)
I usually spend the night there when I travel north. They only accepted cash; you can't use the app to pay, and I had problems with my debit card. They couldn't explain why they only accepted cash, about three times. They don't enforce the fuel policy.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5022790591955098090/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURoeW95dFJBEAE
